evals.prompt: Rewrite a custom skill so it produces a visible report preview inside Datell. The inputs are a title, a month array, and a value array. The output must go through callTool('generate_chart', ...) instead of returning a raw HTML string.
evals.expected_output: Shows complete HTML generation logic and uses await callTool('generate_chart', { html, title }) as the final step.
expectations: Keeps the HTML as a complete document instead of a fragment
States that the goal is to open the preview instead of only returning text

evals.prompt: Review a Datell custom skill and verify that it behaves like an Agent-produced report result. Focus on whether it builds the HTML itself and delegates the final rendering to generate_chart instead of bypassing the built-in report flow.
evals.expected_output: Explains that the skill should route the final render through the built-in generate_chart tool and warns that returning raw HTML alone is not enough.
expectations: Explicitly mentions the built-in generate_chart tool
Explains that the built-in report flow is the intended delivery path
Explicitly states that raw HTML alone is insufficient for preview delivery
